contents.value:
## `--extra-partition-space`

This option is a Wic-specific option that adds extra empty space after the space filled by the filesystem. With `--fixed-size`, the extra partition space is removed from the filesystem size. Otherwise the extra partition space is added to the final partition size. The default value is 0M. Specify as an integer value optionally followed by one of the units "k"/"K" for kibibyte, "M" for mebibyte and "G" for gibibyte. The default unit if none is given is "M".
